name: 格洛克18型 | 拉美西斯之触
nameZh: 格洛克18型 | 拉美西斯之触
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. The Nile river has been custom painted on the slide and the grip depicts Ramesses I, the founding pharaoh of ancient Egypt's 19th Dynasty. \"My people reach for their Gods, and I am here to connect them\"
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 这把武器的套筒和握把上采用了自定义涂装。绘制了尼罗河和拉美西斯一世，他是创立埃及第19王朝的法老。 “我的子民们渴望神的恩典，而我就是连接他们的桥梁”
